name: Dutch Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked, diced ham, apples, potatoes, hard-cooked eggs, and pickles.
2. Add the buttermilk dressing to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Serve the salad on lettuce leaves.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
